 {"id":"gt-ilav.6","title":"Refinery patrol: Add sibling-check step","description":"Refinery should check on Witness health as part of patrol (village sibling watch).

## Implementation

1. Add `sibling-check` step to mol-refinery-patrol (early in cycle)
2. Use `gt peek <rig>/witness 20` to check Witness output
3. Look for signs of health:
   - Recent activity (tool calls, log messages)
   - No error stack traces
   - Responsive to pings
4. If Witness seems stuck:
   - Send status request mail
   - Note for potential escalation
   - Don't block Refinery work

## Acceptance
- Refinery checks Witness each patrol cycle
- Anomalies logged
- Non-blocking (Refinery continues even if Witness is down)","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:54.005132-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:54.005132-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.6","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:54.006928-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-ilav.7","title":"Witness patrol: Add sibling-check for Refinery","description":"Witness should check on Refinery health as part of patrol (village sibling watch).

## Implementation

1. Add `sibling-check` step to mol-witness-patrol
2. Use `gt peek <rig>/refinery 20` to check Refinery output
3. Check Refinery queue status: `gt mq list <rig>`
4. Look for:
   - Refinery session alive
   - Queue processing (if items present)
   - No stuck MRs (same MR in_progress for too long)
5. If Refinery seems stuck:
   - Send nudge or status request
   - Consider escalation to Deacon

## Acceptance
- Witness checks Refinery each patrol cycle
- Can detect stuck Refinery
- Provides backup oversight for merge queue","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:55.760705-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:55.760705-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.7","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:55.762415-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-ilav.8","title":"Recovery: Detect orphaned merged polecats","description":"Safety net for when Refinery misses sending lifecycle notification.

## Detection Points

**Witness polecat-scan**:
- For each polecat in `mr_submitted` state:
  - Check MR status: `gt mq status <mr-id>`
  - If MR is closed/merged but polecat state is still mr_submitted:
    - Update polecat state to `merged`
    - Log recovery action

**Deacon orphan-check**:
- Query all closed MRs
- Cross-reference with polecat states
- If merged MR but polecat not in merged/retired state:
  - Send correction to Witness
  - Log for metrics (indicates Refinery notification missed)

## Acceptance
- Orphaned polecats detected and corrected
- Recovery is logged for monitoring
- No work lost due to missed notifications","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:56.821259-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:56.821259-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.8","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:07:56.823191-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.8","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:08:06.749803-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.8","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:08:06.832711-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"gt-ilav.8","depends_on_id":"gt-ilav.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-23T12:08:06.918149-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"gt-in3x","title":"gt spawn --continue for resuming parked molecules","description":"Add `--continue` flag to gt spawn for resuming parked molecules:

```bash
gt spawn --continue gt-mol-root
```

This:
1. Finds molecule root
2. Verifies molecule is in "parked" state (in_progress, no assignee)
3. Checks external deps are now satisfied
4. Spawns polecat with molecule context
5. Polecat reads handoff mail and continues from blocked step

Part of cross-project dependency system.
See: docs/cross-project-deps.md

Depends on: gt-zniu (gt park)
Depends on Beads: bd-zmmy (bd ready resolution)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-21T22:39:13.154462-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-25T21:00:14.364312-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-25T21:00:14.364312-08:00","close_reason":"Nice-to-have or covered by core patrol lifecycle work.","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"gt-in3x","depends_on_id":"gt-zniu","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-21T22:39:44.707231-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"gt-in7b","title":"gt sling: nudge crew/mayor if session is running","description":"When slinging to crew or mayor, if they have an active tmux session, send a nudge notification so they know work has landed on their hook.

Currently only slingToPolecat nudges (lines 514-521 in internal/cmd/sling.go).

Missing nudge in:
- slingToCrew (line ~669)
- slingToMayor (line ~876)

NOT applicable to patrol-based agents (witness, refinery, deacon) - they run on cycles and pick up work via hook check, not interactive nudge.

Implementation:
1. For crew: need to determine session name (e.g., gastown-crew-max)
2. Check if session running via tmux
3. If running, call t.NudgeSession() with appropriate message","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-23T15:56:22.30857-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-23T15:57:01.19806-08:00"}
